# if(${JVX_OS} MATCHES "windows")
set(JVX_TARGET_NAME "fftw-3.3-win")
message("--> Configuring ${JVX_TARGET_NAME}")
project(${JVX_TARGET_NAME})
set(JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER "x64")
if(JVX_PLATFORM MATCHES "32bit")
	set(JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER "Win32")
endif()

if(NOT JVX_COMPILE_BUILDTOOLS)
	install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER}/ DESTINATION ${INSTALL_PATH_LIB_SHARED} FILES_MATCHING COMPONENT fftw3 PATTERN "*.dll")
endif()

set(FFT_INCLUDEDIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER}" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")	
set(FFT_LIBDIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER}" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")
set(FFT_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS "" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")
set(FFT_LIBRARYF "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER}/libfftw3f-3.lib" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")
set(FFT_LIBRARYD "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${JVX_FFTW_SYSTEM_FOLDER}/libfftw3-3.lib" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")
set(FFT_LIBRARIES "${FFT_LIBRARYF};${FFT_LIBRARYD}" CACHE INTERNAL "fftw lib (windows)")
	
message("     include path: ${FFT_INCLUDEDIR}")
message("     lib path: ${FFT_LIBDIR}")
message("     compile definitions: ${FFT_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
message("     lib float: ${FFT_LIBRARYF}")
message("     lib double: ${FFT_LIBRARYD}")
message("     lib: ${FFT_LIBRARIES}")
